About The Petra Group

Our Mission

The Petra Group bridges the critical gap between employers, employees, and insurance carriers through expert benefits communication, comprehensive administration, and personalized financial planning.

Our Heritage

Founded with over 40 years of insurance industry expertise, The Petra Group has consistently delivered innovative benefits solutions to employers and financial security strategies to individuals.

Core Values

  • Integrity: Honest, transparent partnership in every interaction
  • Expertise: Deep knowledge and continuous professional development
  • Client Focus: Your goals drive our strategies
  • Innovation: Modern solutions to complex benefits challenges
  • Relationship: Long-term partnerships built on trust

What We Do

We serve employers and individuals across multiple industries, offering:

  • Benefits administration and compliance
  • Employee communication and enrollment
  • Retirement and financial planning
  • Carrier partnerships and negotiations
  • Customized benefits strategies

© 2024 The Petra Group Insurance & Financial Services. All rights reserved.

Professional Benefits Administration | Employee Communication | Financial Planning
